Quality Education.reason: Focus on developing critical thinking and writing skills aligns with Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').
As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), develops critical judgment (Target 4.4), and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity through literature (Target 4.7).

To trace the historical and cultural transformations in Western literature in order to understand different cultural perspectives
